character.name: ant-scout
character.prompt: small chunky-cute worker ant, dark warm-brown body (#3a1f12), three body segments, six legs in tripod stance, oversized head with simple antennae, no crown. Wearing a soft pointed explorer cap integrated into the head silhouette — leaf-green cap (#6ab04c) sits low and slightly forward over the eyes, cap brim sits just above the antennae base. Cap reads as a small cap on a small ant not a dome or bulb. Body and proportions identical to worker-ant family.
